name: Canvas Assistant
description: Student-facing Canvas tools for assignments, grades, discussions, messages, and course content

auth.instructions: Generate a Canvas access token in Canvas under Settings > Approved Integrations > New Access Token.

tools.name: get_my_upcoming_assignments
tools.description: List upcoming assignments across the student's active Canvas courses.

tools.name: get_my_submission_status
tools.description: Show the student's submitted, missing, and overdue assignment status.

tools.name: get_my_course_grades
tools.description: Show the student's current grades across active Canvas courses.

tools.name: get_my_todo_items
tools.description: List the student's current Canvas todo items.

tools.name: get_my_peer_reviews_todo
tools.description: List peer reviews the student still needs to complete.

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: List Canvas courses visible to the authenticated student.

tools.name: get_course_details
tools.description: Fetch detailed information for one Canvas course.

tools.name: get_course_content_overview
tools.description: Summarize pages, modules, and syllabus content for a Canvas course.

tools.name: list_pages
tools.description: List readable pages in a Canvas course.

tools.name: get_page_content
tools.description: Fetch the readable content for a Canvas page.

tools.name: get_page_details
tools.description: Fetch metadata for a Canvas page.

tools.name: get_front_page
tools.description: Fetch the front page for a Canvas course when it is visible to the student.

tools.name: list_assignments
tools.description: List assignments visible to the student in a Canvas course.

tools.name: get_assignment_details
tools.description: Fetch details for a Canvas assignment visible to the student from IDs or a full Canvas assignment URL.

tools.name: list_modules
tools.description: List readable modules in a Canvas course.

tools.name: list_module_items
tools.description: List readable module items for a Canvas module.

tools.name: get_course_structure
tools.description: Return the readable module and item structure for a Canvas course.

tools.name: list_course_files
tools.description: List Canvas files visible to the student in a course.

tools.name: list_discussion_topics
tools.description: List discussion topics visible to the student in a Canvas course.

tools.name: get_discussion_topic_details
tools.description: Fetch metadata for a readable Canvas discussion topic.

tools.name: list_discussion_entries
tools.description: List readable entries for a Canvas discussion topic.

tools.name: get_discussion_entry_details
tools.description: Fetch details for a readable Canvas discussion entry.

tools.name: get_discussion_with_replies
tools.description: Fetch a Canvas discussion topic with its visible replies.

tools.name: list_conversations
tools.description: List Canvas conversations visible to the student.

tools.name: get_conversation_details
tools.description: Fetch details for a Canvas conversation visible to the student.

tools.name: get_unread_count
tools.description: Fetch the student's unread Canvas conversation count.

tools.name: search_canvas_tools
tools.description: Discover the student-facing Canvas MCP tool surface.

tools.name: post_discussion_entry
tools.description: Post a new entry to a Canvas discussion when the student is allowed to participate.

tools.name: reply_to_discussion_entry
tools.description: Reply to a Canvas discussion entry when the student is allowed to participate.

tools.name: mark_conversations_read
tools.description: Mark one or more Canvas conversations as read.

tools.name: download_course_file
tools.description: Download a readable Canvas file into the active workspace or another allowed writable path.

author: orbyt
